arts.ttl: I was at Arne Slot press conference and he gave perfect Liverpool answer to difficult Italian question
arts.sum: Arne Slot was asked whether his Liverpool team would be "scared" of facing AC Milan

arts.ttl: Champions League: Slot provides Liverpool assessment ahead of Milan trip
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot admitted that he has ‘a lot of respect’ for Milan, but...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's pre-AC Milan press conference: 'It's a big game - one to look forward to' - Liverpool FC
arts.sum: It's difficult to say before you start, but I think it's clear if you want to end up in the first eight you have to win a lot of games and you need a lot of points. For me, it had a lot to do with the playing style of the opponent, who made it really difficult for us, but in the end if you don't win then you try to look at as many arguments as you can find - and I also asked myself the question, 'OK, does it have to do with the things you said?' But I prefer to look at the game back and see what we did well, what we didn’t do well and I think we could have done a lot of things much better that was not related to rotation.

arts.ttl: Alisson Becker: We have to be ready for AC Milan and at our very best
arts.sum: For us players as well, it’s a good thing that you are going to play against the best in Europe. Everybody is enthusiastic about Federico and he is extremely happy about having this chance of playing in our squad.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Liverpool plan for Federico Chiesa ahead of AC Milan clash in Champions League
arts.sum: Chiesa yet to make first appearance this season after signing from Juventus

arts.ttl: Chiesa in Liverpool squad for UCL trip to Milan
arts.sum: Arne Slot said Federico Chiesa is still not fit to start for Liverpool, despite naming the Italy forward in his squad for Tuesday's Champions League clash against AC Milan in the San Siro.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains Liverpool plan for Federico Chiesa and Alexis Mac Allister vs Milan
arts.sum: Arne Slot was speaking in his Liverpool press conference ahead of the Champions League opener against AC Milan

arts.ttl: Liverpool Include Chiesa in squad for AC Milan clash
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa has received his first call-up to the Liverpool squad as they prepare to face AC Milan in their Champions League opener. The Italian winger, who joined the Reds in the summer transfer window, is part of the 23-man squad that departed for Italy on Monday afternoon. Squad Details The full Liverpool squad for the match includes: Goalkeepers: Alisson, Kelleher, Jaros Defenders: Alexander-Arnold, Konate, Van Dijk, Robertson, Gomez, Quansah, Tsimikas Midfielders: Endo, Szoboszlai, Mac Allister, Jones, Gravenberch Forwards: Salah, Jota, Diaz, Gakpo, Nunez, Chiesa Chiesa’s Situation This marks Chiesa’s first inclusion in a Liverpool matchday squad since his transfer The post Liverpool Include Chiesa in squad for AC Milan clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Alisson explains Federico Chiesa impact and sends strong response to Champions League changes
arts.sum: Alisson Becker has been speaking ahead of Liverpool's Champions League clash against AC Milan in Italy on Tuesday

arts.ttl: Arne Slot expecting Liverpool reaction as Champions League campaign begins in Milan
arts.sum: The Reds face AC Milan in their opening European match of the campaign
